name: Chocolate Almond Cheesecake
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup cocoa powder + 2 tablespoons cocoa powder, divided
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the graham cracker crumbs, 1/4 cup sugar, cocoa powder, and butter in a bowl. Mix well. Press into the bottom of a 9-inch springform pan and chill.
2. In a mixing bowl, beat the cream cheese, sour cream, and remaining sugar until smooth. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition. Stir in 1 teaspoon almond extract and remaining cocoa powder.
3. Pour the mixture into the crust. Bake at 350°F for 45 to 50 minutes or until the center is almost set. Cool completely.
4. Refrigerate at least 8 hours.
5. In a mixing bowl, whip cream until it mounds slightly. Add confectioner's sugar and remaining almond extract; continue whipping until soft peaks form. Spread evenly over cheesecake.
6. Sprinkle with almonds. Store in the refrigerator.
